backups.label: old-accepted-signer
backups.note: Old accepted APK signer; install/update compatible with currently old-signed installs.

backups.label: debug-key-release-build
backups.note: Earlier 2.0.8 release artifact signed with project debug keystore; not update-compatible with old accepted signer or new persistent release key.

backups.label: new-persistent-release-key
backups.note: Current usual APK signed with newly persisted FrankenKey release key; future builds should use this signer.

backups.label: snippet-seam-long-candidate-release
backups.note: Release with subtle snippets/suggestions divider and smaller long suggestion labels.

backups.label: layout-toggle-number-entry-shortcuts-release
backups.note: Release with Spacebar swipe to toggle Fleksy/FrankenKey mode and number-entry shortcuts/settings polish.

backups.label: samsung-gboard-clipboard-parity-release
backups.note: Release with Samsung-style compact expandable editable clipboard cards and Gboard-style screenshot/image clipboard save/pin/paste support.

backups.label: debug-deep-clipboard-numpad-cog-release
backups.note: Debug-deep release with MediaStore-backed recent screenshot capture permission flow, fixed-size ellipsized clipboard cards, q top-left cog toggle, and No. number-entry shortcut on the 123 key.

backups.label: debug-deep-screenshot-permission-p-cog-no-release
backups.note: Debug-deep release with automatic screenshot media permission request from the clipboard surface, Android 14 selected-visual-media permission, cog moved to p top-right, and No. on 123 opening the numeric page directly.

backups.label: debug-deep-screenshot-refresh-release
backups.note: Debug-deep release with clipboard-open MediaStore screenshot refresh when permission is already granted and observer refresh queries latest screenshot.

backups.label: debug-deep-screenshot-startup-crash-release
backups.note: Debug-deep release fixing startup crash when MediaStore screenshot refresh adds an image history entry before ClipboardHistoryService._service is published.

backups.label: settings-backup-restore-release
backups.note: Release adding complete Settings backup/restore export and import for default settings, direct-boot runtime preferences, named stores, snippets, dictionaries, emoji recents, and pinned clipboard data.

backups.label: settings-backup-restore-top-release
backups.note: Release moving complete Settings backup/restore controls to the top of Settings so Export all settings and Import all settings are immediately visible after reinstall.

backups.label: clean-key-legends-release
backups.note: Release hiding the requested clean-layout secondary gesture legends on Q, P, D, F, G, H, J, 123, and Backspace while retaining their swipe actions.

backups.label: shared-spatial-decoder-release
backups.note: Release replacing synchronous duplicate suggestion/autocorrect paths with one bounded spatial decoder, stale-result protection, contextual personalization, and the requested spacebar clipboard/emoji/GIF gestures.

backups.label: first-pass-prewarm-and-safe-repeat-release
backups.note: Release prewarming and reusing suggestion resources for first-pass results, plus independent safe repeat intervals for paste and destructive delete actions.

backups.label: autocapitalisation-repair-release
backups.note: Release repairing standalone i capitalization, delayed sentence-start casing, and autocap state after corrected replacements.

backups.label: field-capitalisation-compatibility-release
backups.note: Release adding sentence-capitalization fallback for generic text fields and verified standalone-I handling across URI/plain editors without affecting password fields.

backups.label: adaptive-correction-learning-release
backups.note: Release adding bounded weighted typo-to-target learning with adjacent-typo generalization, undo-safe commit tokens, confirmed clear/forget actions, and dark-default Settings.

backups.label: adaptive-learning-delivered-behavior-fix-release
backups.note: Release fixing adaptive learning with hidden suggestions, fast manual corrections, correction-only targets, exact recall priority, and undo-safe evidence.

backups.label: two-edit-exact-correction-learning-release
backups.note: Release making repeated exact corrections override nearer guesses, supporting bounded two-edit textual pairs, and preserving Unicode correction identities and surfaces without widening ordinary or related autocorrect.

backups.label: consent-based-github-updater-release
backups.note: Release adding default-on update checks, changelog consent, verified in-app APK delivery, manual GitHub delivery, and in-place installation that preserves user data.

backups.label: test-update-release
backups.note: Test update for verifying FrankenKey update announcements and authenticated in-app delivery.

backups.label: termux-input-compatibility-release
backups.note: Release restoring raw DEL Backspace plus stateless dictionary suggestions and autocorrect in the official Termux editor.

backups.label: snippet-icon-picker-release
backups.note: Release adding a 56-icon Lucide picker and themed icon rendering for snippet buttons.

backups.label: compact-snippet-icons-release
backups.note: Release reducing snippet-row icons by 25 percent for a cleaner keyboard balance.

backups.label: centered-snippet-icons-release
backups.note: Correction release centering compact snippet icons within their keyboard buttons.

backups.label: two-axis-centered-snippet-icons-release
backups.note: Correction release geometrically centering compact snippet icons on both axes.

backups.label: theme-aware-snippet-foreground-release
backups.note: Release applying contrast-safe theme foregrounds to snippet icons and text.

backups.label: binary-snippet-foreground-release
backups.note: Release forcing pure white snippet foregrounds on dark themes and pure black on light themes.

backups.label: restore-original-snippet-icons-release
backups.note: Rollback release restoring the original visible 20dp snippet icons and standard Android rendering.

backups.label: centered-snippet-icons-release
backups.note: Release centering visible 20dp snippet icons within their slots while preserving theme tint.

backups.label: production-identity-release
backups.note: Release restoring explicit production name and launcher identity with a mandatory debug-artifact rejection gate.

backups.label: swiftkey-parity-correction-voice-release
backups.note: Test release with broader safe-field correction, opt-in system grammar, in-process multimodal voice typing, and cleaner settings.

backups.label: search-omnibox-correction-release
backups.note: Test release enabling stateless suggestions and autocorrect in Google Search and browser URL/search fields, with the privacy card first.

backups.label: nonblocking-autocorrect-parity-release
backups.note: Release with nonblocking late-boundary autocorrect, platform correction highlights, safer short-word ranking, and the consolidated safe-field correction improvements.

backups.label: space-autocorrection-release
backups.note: Release making shown autocorrection candidates apply reliably on Space while preserving immediate Backspace undo.

backups.label: short-word-contraction-backspace-test-release
backups.note: Local test release for short-word undo learning, single-delete Backspace, and common apostrophe contractions.

backups.label: learned-word-autocorrect-veto-test-release
backups.note: Local test release preventing automatic replacement of learned words while allowing unlearned im to contract to I'm.

backups.label: learned-apostrophe-preference-test-release
backups.note: Local test release learning repeated exact straight-apostrophe preferences without reopening ordinary learned-word spelling replacements.

backups.label: capitalized-first-person-contraction-test-release
backups.note: Local test release forcing every straight-apostrophe first-person I'm candidate to display and commit with capital I.

backups.label: cmux-terminal-delete-release
backups.note: Release making CMUX Backspace emit exactly one terminal delete callback and enabling reliable middle-row swipe deletion in CMUX.
